title: polygala nicaeensis subsp. carniolica
intro: Polygala nicaeensis subsp. carniolica, also known as Alpenrose or Rock Joy, is a flowering plant species within the Polygalaceae family, native to the alpine regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Polygala nicaeensis subsp. carniolica include its potential to soothe respiratory problems, reduce stress, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used as a natural remedy for colds, fever, and digestive issues.
